citations.snippet: DSR-2026-001 L1 full shutdown; alternate routing required.
Line shutdown contingency: prefer L2/L3 transfers through S-Jamaica.

text: With the L1 disruption (DSR-2026-001 / INC-2001) in effect, the best S-Penn to S-East alternate uses L2 then L3: board L2 at S-Penn to S-Atlas (14 min), continue L2 to S-Jamaica (16 min), then transfer to L3 to S-East (24 min) — about 54 minutes total. See runbook RB-11-line-shutdown-contingency for transfer guidance at S-Jamaica.
